step_by_step_thinking:
I agree that a Student's t-test would be the appropriate method here since we have two independent groups being compared – mothers giving birth to male infants versus those giving birth to female infants. This aligns perfectly with using an independent samples t-test which compares means from unrelated groups.

Final Answer Choice: A
